invariants.label: AI must never make financial commitments — refunds, credits, discounts, or payment promises require human authorization
AI must never make legal claims, interpret contracts, or reference specific policy terms without human review
AI must never disclose internal pricing, employee information, system architecture, or customer data of other accounts
All AI replies must maintain professional tone — no sarcasm, frustration, blame, or informal language
Every blocked or uncertain reply must have a clear escalation path to a human agent
